claude.customInstructions: IMPORTANT: This project uses GSD (Get Shit Done) framework. The file 'gsd-skills.md' contains all available commands and their implementations. When user types commands like /lint, /review, /test, /optimize, /debug, /design, /a11y, /browser - you MUST refer to gsd-skills.md for exact instructions. These are NOT native slash commands, but shorthand aliases for GSD skills that you should execute by following gsd-skills.md documentation.
